dealSummary: San Francisco-based Cognition, an AI coding startup, is in talks to raise new funding at a $25 billion valuation, Bloomberg reported.
Helsinki-based AI cloud infrastructure startup Verda raised $117 million in equity and debt in a round led by Lifeline Ventures.

Salmon, a Philippines-based fintech startup, has raised $100 million in new funding, consisting of $40 million in debt and $60 million in equity from investors including Spice Expeditions, FJ Labs and Moore Strategic Ventures.
leadInvestors: Spice Expeditions, FJ Labs, Moore Strategic Ventures
